mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kodik_content_enrichment WHERE content_id = #{contentId} AND source = #{source}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kodik_content_enrichment ( content_id, source, external_id, title_native, title_english, title_russian, description, score, raw_payload, fetched_at, last_refreshed_at ) VALUES ( #{row.contentId}, #{row.source}, #{row.externalId}, #{row.titleNative}, #{row.titleEnglish}, #{row.titleRussian}, #{row.description}, #{row.score}, #{row.rawPayload}, #{row.fetchedAt}, #{row.lastRefreshedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE external_id = VALUES(external_id), title_native = VALUES(title_native), title_english = VALUES(title_english), title_russian = VALUES(title_russian), description = VALUES(description), score = VALUES(score), raw_payload = VALUES(raw_payload), fetched_at = COALESCE(fetched_at, VALUES(fetched_at)), last_refreshed_at = VALUES(last_refreshed_at)
